use_cases: Displaying featured content or premium offerings with immersive 3D card effects on dark-themed landing pages
Showcasing product highlights with interactive hover states and subtle depth animation
Creating visually striking feature cards in SaaS dashboards or fintech applications
Designing eye-catching promotional sections with mouse-tracking parallax effects
ai_summary: An interactive gradient card component featuring real-time 3D rotation effects that follow mouse movement, creating a dynamic parallax-like experience. The card uses a dark navy background with glowing purple-blue shadow effects and smooth spring animations via Framer Motion. Ideal for dark-themed websites seeking premium, immersive card presentations with subtle depth and hover responsiveness.
